_publications._publicationTitle: Spectrophotometric and computational characterization of charge transfer complex of selumetinib with 2,3-dichloro-5,6-dicyano-1,4-benzoquinone and its utilization in developing an innovative green and high throughput microwell assay for analysis of bulk form and pharmaceutical formulation.

_contextSnippet: The physicochemical features of SEL and DDQ were described using the molecular electrostatic potential surface (MEPS) diagram. The non-covalent interaction (NCI) analysis was used to obtain a visual depiction
details: Successfully generated molecular electrostatic potential surface diagrams and non-covalent interaction analysis for SEL-DDQ complex characterization
